creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

We already have slnr in our ports collection. 
The only significant difference that the submitted port has is the contents of 
files/porting.notes. 
If slnr port in ports-current doesn't have any problem (well, it  
shouldn't as the submitted one wasn't any different from it, though), 
I will go ahead 'n' close this PR. 
Please take a look and let me know whether any change is needed.
